title: Errors and Exceptions
text: Errors and Exceptions Uniface provides errors and exceptions that can be returned by JavaScript functions in the case of an unexpected condition. Related Links uniface.SyntaxError The uniface.SyntaxError object provides access to the error number and message of a field syntax error, and to the incorrect field value that caused the error. uniface.ValidationError The uniface.ValidationError object provides access to the error number and message of a validation error on the server. It is returned by the FieldErrorContext.getError function when used in the showError and clearError web triggers. uniface.InvalidContextObjectException Exception thrown if the FieldErrorContext object on which the function is called is no longer valid. uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. uniface.InvalidSyntaxPropertyException Exception thrown if the name of the syntax property specified as a parameter is invalid. uniface.OccurrenceCreationException Exception thrown if the occurrence could not be created.
